channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Spring 2026 Student Course Evaluations Now Open
item.description: Date: Tuesday, April 14, 2026 (all day) - Spring 2026 course evaluations are now open. The evaluation period will be open from April 14th through April 30th. Your feedback is very important to the Institute, the five schools, and their departments, so please complete evaluation surveys for all your courses! Evaluations will be available through Thursday, April 30, 2026.
item.author: Students

item.title: Late Night Breakfast This Thursday April 30th!
item.description: Join us for a Decades Themed Late-Night Breakfast this Thursday, April 30th from 9–11 PM at Commons Dining Hall! Come dressed in your favorite era, whether it’s groovy ’70s, neon ’80s, or early 2000s vibes, and enjoy a fun night of food, music, and nostalgia. All forms of payment accepted for entry. If you have any questions you can email dining@rpi.edu.
item.author: Students

item.title: Nominate a Graduate Student for Student Spotlight!
item.description: Know a graduate student who is doing fascinating work or has an interesting story to tell? We’d like to highlight their accomplishments on our Student Spotlight page. Who embodies the BEST in your department? Who presents innovative and exciting ideas? Who leads others to become their best selves? Faculty, students, and staff may nominate a student here: https://surveys.rpi.edu/jfe/form/SV_1z9O3WGwx7ybE7c (Nominate a 2nd student by clicking the link again.) Questions? email madige@rpi.edu
item.author: Community

item.title: Sherry Road lot changes
item.description: Effective Monday, May 4, Sherry Road lot will transition to pay per hour parking only. Please ensure your parking session is active for the duration of your stay, as vehicles without valid payment may be subject to enforcement. For additional information, please contact Parking and Transportation Services.
item.author: Community

item.title: Blackboard Ultra Course View Preview Video
item.description: The Summer 2026 semester will be using Blackboard Ultra Course View. In preparation, here is a preview video of Blackboard Ultra Course View. You will need to log in with your RPI credentials.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Division of Human Resources Workshop: RPI MAX for Staff: Leveraging Feedback and Career Opportunities- May 7, 2026 8AM-10AM
item.description: Date: Thursday, May 7, 2026 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM - As an employee, you work in partnership with your manager to align expectations and set meaningful goals. Throughout the year, you check in together, recalibrate as needed, and celebrate progress and achievements. This workshop focuses on supporting your individual career development, preparing for the annual manager evaluation, setting effective goals, and using tools that can help you advance your career.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Division of Human Resources Workshop: RPI MAX for Supervisors: Performance and Coaching - May 7, 2026 10AM-12PM
item.description:
Date: Thursday, May 7, 2026 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM - As a manager, you play a central role in guiding the performance process for your employees—working collaboratively to align expectations, support development, and monitor progress toward achieving goals. This workshop introduces the core principles of performance coaching, including how to identify and evaluate performance gaps, set effective goals, and lead the RPI MAX performance process. Participants will also explore practical tools for…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
